runtime.pipeline_command: RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT}" && TRAIN_END="2026-02-20" && VAL_END="2026-03-01" && TEST_END="2026-03-14" && mkdir -p "$RUN_ROOT" && python -u -m pump_end_threshold.cli.train_pump_end_model --mode tune --dataset-parquet "${DATASET_PARQUET}" --train-end "$TRAIN_END" --val-end "$VAL_END" --test-end "$TEST_END" --time-budget-min 45 --fold-months 1 --min-train-months 3 --signal-rule pending_turn_down --out-dir "$RUN_ROOT" --run-name "$EXP_ID" && python -u scripts/threshold_run_report.py "$RUN_ROOT/$EXP_ID"
